title: PPIP - Share data button presented after log out
scenario: Share data toggle in App Settings > General > Account reappears after logout but disappears after login with Poly credentials
steps: 2. On the Home screen, tap the menu icon (hamburger) or navigate to Account.
4. When prompted with the 'Share data' toggle, set it to either ON (Share) or OFF (Don't Share).
5. Complete onboarding and land on the Home screen.
6. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
7. Observe the 'Share data' toggle is present and reflects the choice made in step 4.
8. Log out of the app (if logged in as guest, log in with Poly credentials).
9. Log in using valid Poly credentials.
10. Navigate to App Settings → General → Account.
13. Navigate again to App Settings → General → Account.
expected: The 'Share data' toggle should be consistently visible in App Settings > General > Account regardless of login state (guest or Poly credentials).
